name: Cal.com
description: Connect your Cal.com account so the agent can list event types, find open slots, and book, reschedule, or cancel meetings.

get_me.label: Get Account
get_me.description: Look up the connected Cal.com account (username, email, default timezone).

list_event_types.label: List Event Types
list_event_types.description: List the bookable meeting types and their durations.

get_available_slots.label: Check Availability
get_available_slots.description: Find open time slots for an event type within a date range.

create_booking.label: Book Meeting
create_booking.description: Schedule a meeting on an event type for the customer.

list_bookings.label: List Bookings
list_bookings.description: List bookings, optionally filtered, to find one before rescheduling or cancelling.

get_booking.label: Get Booking
get_booking.description: Get a single booking's details by its reference.

cancel_booking.label: Cancel Booking
cancel_booking.description: Cancel an accepted or pending booking.

reschedule_booking.label: Reschedule Booking
reschedule_booking.description: Move an accepted or pending booking to a new time.

apiKey.label: API Key
apiKey.description: Your Cal.com API key (starts with cal_). Create one under Settings → Developer → API keys.
